---
title: "Create QR Code"
description: "POST /api/v1/einvoice/qr-code/create"
openapi: "POST /api/v1/einvoice/qr-code/create"
---

**POST** `/api/v1/einvoice/qr-code/create`

## Request example

```bash
curl -X POST "{{BASE_URL}}/api/v1/einvoice/qr-code/create" \
  -H "API-KEY: <your_api_key>" \
  -H "API-SECRET: <your_api_secret>" \
  -H "Accept: application/json"
```

Request body:

```json
{
  "public_key": "",
  "certificate": "bEF0V3FJbmo5cVZYbEdCblB4QVpjM3FESWNCS0pSa0MzSmJpUkpQWVVTST0=",
  "irn": "ABDULAHI1253636373-088EDD1B-20250629"
}
```

## Response examples

**200**

```json
{
  "status": true,
  "code": 200,
  "message": "QR Code generated successfully",
  "data": {
    "qr_code": "data:image/png;base64,",
    "encrypted_data": "",
    "irn": "TEST001-088EDD1B-20250629",
    "generated_at": "2025-09-24T04:27:48.118865Z"
  }
}
```

**400**

```json
{
  "status": false,
  "code": 400,
  "message": "Failed to validate invoice",
  "data": null,
  "error": {
    "id": "5c4c008e-8f1e-4034-a96b-8b352c143da5",
    "handler": "invoice_actions",
    "details": "this business does not exist",
    "public_message": "validation failed"
  },
  "timestamp": "2025-12-23T14:54:12.477393Z"
}
```

**401**

```json
{
  "status": false,
  "code": 401,
  "message": "Unauthorized",
  "data": null,
  "error": {
    "details": "invalid or missing API credentials"
  }
}
```
